top_findings.summary: The skill includes pre- and post-hooks that execute arbitrary shell commands and run Node.js scripts from a specific local directory (`/workspaces/ruvector/.claude/intelligence`), accessing and potentially modifying local files (`$FILE`) without clear explanation of why this is necessary for cloud-based swarm orchestration. The skill's stated purpose is cloud-based AI agent deployment and workflow automation, which should not require arbitrary local file access and script execution unrelated to the cloud platform.
